title: Event Trigger
description: A trigger that fires a named event when a condition is met.

event.description: The name of the event to run when this trigger fires.

oneOf.description: The entity or object calling the test.
The block involved with the interaction.
The damaging actor involved with the interaction.
The other member of an interaction, not the caller.
The player involved with the interaction.

target.description: The subject of the trigger. Defaults to 'self'.

filters.description: Optional. The filter conditions that must be met for the event to fire.
